properties.displayName: Entra ID MFA Fatigue with Successful Authentication and Device Context Correlation
properties.description: Detects potential MFA fatigue (push bombing) attacks where a user receives multiple MFA prompts, declines several requests, and eventually completes a successful authentication within a short period.
properties.query:
let timeframe = 20m;
let denialThreshold = 5;
let riskScoreThreshold = 8;
let lookback = 14d;
let KnownDevices = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(lookback) .. ago(1h))
| summarize KnownDeviceSet = make_set(DeviceDetail.displayName) by UserPrincipalName;
let MFAFatigue = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where AuthenticationRequirement == "multiFactorAuthentication"
| extend ResultTypeString = tostring(ResultType)
| extend MFA_Status = tostring(Status.additionalDetails)
| extend RiskLevelString = tostring(RiskLevelDuringSignIn)
| extend RiskLevelScore = case(RiskLevelString == "high", 5, RiskLevelString == "medium", 3, RiskLevelString == "low", 1, 0)
| summarize DenialCount = countif(MFA_Status has "User declined" or ResultTypeString == "500121"), SuccessCount = countif(ResultTypeString == "0"), IPList = make_set(IPAddress), LocationList = make_set(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion), CityList = make_set(LocationDetails.city), DeviceList = make_set(DeviceDetail.displayName), OSList = make_set(DeviceDetail.operatingSystem), BrowserList = make_set(DeviceDetail.browser), MaxRiskLevelScore = max(RiskLevelScore) by UserPrincipalName, bin(TimeGenerated, timeframe)
| where DenialCount >= denialThreshold and SuccessCount > 0;
MFAFatigue
| join kind=leftouter KnownDevices on UserPrincipalName
| extend NewDeviceUsed = iff(array_length(set_difference(DeviceList, coalesce(KnownDeviceSet, dynamic([])))) > 0, true, false)
| extend MultipleCountries = iff(array_length(LocationList) > 1, true, false)
| extend MultipleIPs = iff(array_length(IPList) > 1, true, false)
| extend RiskScore = DenialCount + (SuccessCount * 2) + (toint(NewDeviceUsed) * 3) + (toint(MultipleCountries) * 3) + (toint(MultipleIPs) * 2) + MaxRiskLevelScore
| where RiskScore >= riskScoreThreshold
| extend RiskLevel = case(MaxRiskLevelScore == 5, "high", MaxRiskLevelScore == 3, "medium", MaxRiskLevelScore == 1, "low", "none")
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, DenialCount, SuccessCount, RiskLevel, RiskScore, NewDeviceUsed, MultipleCountries, MultipleIPs, IPAddress = tostring(IPList[0]), IPList, LocationList, CityList, DeviceList, OSList, BrowserList
